hooks.command: echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.(env|env\.local|env\.production)' && echo 'BLOCKED: edit .env files manually to avoid leaking secrets' && exit 1 || exit 0
echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'package-lock.json' && echo 'BLOCKED: never edit lock files directly — use npm install inside the container' && exit 1 || exit 0

FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then cd /Users/aguimar/Documents/devel/para/para-app && docker compose exec -T app npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0
